meta.name: QC, filter & cluster (raw counts)
meta.description: Compute QC metrics, drop low-quality cells and rare genes, then normalize and cluster. For unprocessed data.
meta.provenance: Standard scanpy QC-to-clustering path; targets unprocessed raw-count data such as Xenium.

readme: Computes QC metrics, filters low-quality cells (fewer than 10 genes) and rare genes (fewer than 3 cells), then runs the same normalize → log1p → PCA → neighbors → Leiden path as 'Preprocess & cluster (raw counts)'.
